description_long: This dam structure is constructed primarily from wood, featuring a large, curved central section reminiscent of a half-pipe, flanked by vertical walls on either side. The surface is smooth and segmented, with visible seams between the wooden panels. Metal railings run along the top edges for safety, and a stairway is present on one end, leading to an elevated platform. The dam sits on a flat, gray base, which may represent concrete or paved ground. There is a rectangular opening at the base of one wall, possibly for water passage or maintenance access.
description: A large, wooden dam with a curved central section, metal railings, and a stairway leading to an elevated platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved wooden face, metal railings, and a central rectangular opening at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the curved section and the stairway structure on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back wall, the rectangular opening, and the vertical stairway enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the curved section and the stairway enclosure on the left.
